overall.description: A cinematic walk through a medieval wizarding school courtyard in a video game, featuring cobblestone pathways, manicured gardens with a central tiered fountain, and students in robes. The scene is bathed in golden hour light with misty mountains surrounding the gothic castle architecture.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the curved cobblestone path on the left side of the courtyard

notable_agents.action: student in dark robes sitting on a stone bench
group of students walking across the lawn toward the center

entered.detail: curved cobblestone walkway with wet reflective stones
misty green mountains surrounding the castle valley
large gothic stone castle with multiple towers and spires
tall flagpoles with red and gold banners lining the courtyard
multi-tiered circular stone fountain in the courtyard center
manicured green hedge borders and flower beds

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a cobblestone path curving through a vast castle courtyard. Misty mountains rise in the background while the gothic castle building dominates the right side. Students in wizard robes are scattered throughout, some sitting on benches and others walking across the lawn. The camera moves forward along the path toward the central fountain area.

events.description: camera steps off the cobblestone path onto the grass lawn

agents.ego_description: walking across the grass toward the central fountain, navigating around groups of students

notable_agents.action: student in yellow robes walking alongside the camera path
student in dark robes walking briskly toward the fountain area

entered.detail: ornate stone bench with students resting

segments.scene_description: Moving from the cobblestone path onto the grass lawn, the camera crosses the central garden area. The fountain grows larger in view as the castle main entrance becomes more prominent ahead. Students in various colored robes walk across the lawn, and the camera passes a stone bench on the left while approaching two students standing near the fountain.

events.description: camera returns to cobblestone path near the fountain base

agents.ego_description: approaching the central fountain and castle gate, passing two students conversing in colored robes

notable_agents.action: student in red robes standing and conversing near the fountain edge
student in blue robes standing beside the fountain with the red-robed student

entered.detail: large arched stone entrance gate to the main castle building
large decorative stone planter with blooming flowers

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches the central fountain on a cobblestone plaza. Two students in distinctive red and blue robes stand conversing near the fountain before the camera passes them. The massive castle gate looms ahead, framed by stone walls and towers, while decorative planters line the path. The fountain's water tiers are clearly visible as the camera moves to the center of the courtyard.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sprawling castle courtyard that transitions from a winding peripheral path to the heart of a grand architectural plaza. It begins along a curving cobblestone path with misty mountains in the distance and the gothic castle looming to the right, while students in robes populate the surrounding lawns and benches. As the camera leaves the path and crosses the manicured grass, the central garden opens up and the castle's main entrance becomes more prominent. The scene then shifts onto a cobblestone plaza, passing a stone bench and two conversing students in red and blue robes as the tiered fountain grows in scale. Finally, the camera moves toward the center of the courtyard, framed by decorative planters and the massive castle gate towering between stone walls.
